rationale: In the citing paper, Datta, Foubert, and Van Heerde (2015) appears only as part of a grouped literature citation on acquisition-related information and subsequent CLV. The authors use that citation block to position their work broadly against prior acquisition-mode studies, but they do not discuss this paper's specific findings, mechanisms, measures, or methods in detail. There is no direct build-on, reuse, or critique tied to this specific cited article in the model development or empirical analysis.
